$comment: Canonical source for scaffold-images slot model assignments and source diversity rules. Issue #1261: agent silently overrode model selection across slots, observer was blind to deviations because no spec_deviations[] field existed and no JSON spec to compare against. This file is the single truth source. Drift detection: validate-image-spec-compliance.py compares .runs/image-manifest.json (agent output) against this file at runtime and requires spec_deviations[] declarations for any deviation. Three-way coherence between this file, .claude/procedures/scaffold-images.md Phase 1 table, and .claude/stacks/images/fal.md model table is NOT statically enforced today — drift between them is caught only when the agent's run produces a spec-vs-manifest mismatch. A static coherence rule for compile-time three-way pinning is future work (would require a markdown-table parser).
_schema_version_notes: v1 (2026-05-04, #1261): initial spec with closed deviation enum
_audit_notes: Round-2 critic Concern 2: 'budget-low-quality-gate-tripped' enum value DROPPED — the corroborator (self_score < 9) is written by the same actor as the deviation claim. All remaining enum values require external-actor witnesses (visual brief grep, fal API error log, fal API 4xx response).

When adding a new slot or changing model assignment: update this file FIRST, then propagate to scaffold-images.md table and fal.md table. Drift between the three files is NOT statically guarded; the runtime validator validate-image-spec-compliance.py catches manifest-vs-spec mismatches but does not parse the markdown tables.

visual-brief-overrides.description: visual brief explicitly mandates a different model for cross-slot style consistency

source-rate-limited.description: primary source returned HTTP 429 rate-limit; agent fell back to alternative
source-rate-limited.required_evidence: .runs/fal-api-errors.jsonl entry with http_status=429 for the slot

model-unavailable-fallback.description: primary model returned HTTP 4xx model-not-found; agent fell back to alternative
model-unavailable-fallback.required_evidence: .runs/fal-api-errors.jsonl entry with http_status in {404, 422} or error_body containing 'model_not_found' for the slot

hero.rationale: Highest-impact slot; FLUX best photorealism + GPT-2 alt for explore diversity + Unsplash for ground-truth photography

logo.rationale: Only model producing native SVG paths; no Unsplash for vector logos

og-photo.rationale: GPT-2 ~99% text rendering accuracy for OG image overlays
